events.title: World Ocean Celebration: Open Water Swim
events.description: Start your Sunday morning in the ocean. If you’re a confident swimmer who loves the water – or is ready to take your swimming beyond the pool – join us for an Open Water Swim*. You’ll dive into the Atlantic from the 1st Street Beach alongside the Dolphins & Rainbows Swim Group – a welcoming, safety-focused community of capable swimmers who cherish the ocean.

events.description: On Meridian Avenue through Washington Avenue, local vendors gather along Lincoln Road to sell fruits, vegetables, fresh-cut flowers and more. Rain or shine, guests are welcome to explore the area to find regional treasures. Every Sunday at 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM on Lincoln Road.
